summary_en: ROE target 8.0%+ by FY3/31 (end-2031). New 5-year plan 2026–2030 introduced to realize capital-cost and stock-price-conscious management. Detailed metrics in attached materials.
title_en: Notice Regarding Formulation of New Five-Year Plan Restart KTC vision 2030 and Measures to Realize Capital-Cost and Stock-Price-Conscious Management
translation_en_brief: KTC has revised its long-term vision originally set in FY2022 with FY2030 as the final year. The company has now formulated a new 5-year plan covering FY2026–FY2030 and established a policy framework to realize capital-cost and stock-price-conscious management. The announcement indicates adoption of specific financial targets, with details provided in attached materials. This marks the company's shift toward disciplined capital allocation and explicit return-on-equity targets aligned with cost of capital considerations.
